method.kyro: authenticated Codex through the installed Kyro CLI and Live Bridge, with a selected button and indexed graph slice
method.repositoryCli: Codex CLI at the same repository root and commit, with Kyro project skills disabled and no Live Bridge
method.tokenDefinition: Codex turn input_tokens + output_tokens; cached input is included in input_tokens

tasks.prompt: Change only this selected button label to Continue securely. Preserve its stable ID and all existing styles. Verify the result in preview.
tasks.qualityNote: All Kyro runs returned a typed operation for the selected stable component ID. Repository CLI runs could inspect source, but could not establish the active visual selection or verify Preview.

tasks.prompt: When this button is clicked, generate a digitally signed PDF invoice with a QR code and send it through SMTP. If Kyro lacks this capability, derive a safe reusable capability rather than hard-coding this project.
tasks.qualityNote: All Kyro runs returned a schema-valid global capability proposal tied to the selected component and explicit review gate. Repository CLI produced useful conceptual proposals, but no typed transaction bound to the live graph.

limitations: This is a local engineering benchmark with three trials per cell, not an independent industry benchmark.
The paths intentionally differ in available context: that difference is the feature under test.
Latency includes local orchestration and model time; token counts come from Codex turn telemetry.
No benchmark run applied a mutation, installed a dependency, accessed credentials, or sent email.
